blockers.description: Docker CLI not in WSL — use powershell.exe workaround
uvicorn --reload misses NTFS file changes — must docker restart backend after .py edits
Backend NOT yet restarted after export.py + sync.py changes this session
.planning/*.md files show as modified in git status — CRLF-only noise, do NOT stage
blockers.workaround: Never stage .planning/ unless content was intentionally edited

decisions.decision: Sidebar shows project_key (short) on top, full project_name below — NOT site_name/cloud instance
BugReportPage fetches project meta from new GET /api/projects/{project_key}; SprintPage already had projectName from /api/projects list
Truncation needs projectInfo container with min-width:0 and flex:1 — added to both pages
decisions.rationale: Flex child won't truncate without min-width:0 on container

decisions.rationale: User said keep sprint as base

decisions.decision: export.py: project_name row only added if project_name is non-empty (conditional)
